name: Lemon Verbena Cordial
recipeInstructions:
1. Since verbena leaves are quite wiry and springy, it is difficult to get an accurate measure. Compress the leaves by grasping them tightly; about 3/4 ounce should be the right amount if you have a scale.
2. Steep the leaves in vodka for one week, shaking the jar occasionally.
3. Strain through cheesecloth and press out any remaining liquid from the leaves.
4. Sweeten with sugar syrup to taste. Enjoy your cordial.
